name: rundrill-anylearn
description: Learn anything inside your AI agent — turns the chat into a saved, plan-based course. Tell it what you want to learn; it asks your goal, level, deadline and the win that matters, then builds an ordered plan of tiny topics and teaches them one at a time. Every topic is grounded in trusted sources it looks up first (so you're not learning from a guess), explained simply, then drilled with 3-5 short exercises and a check. Your plan and progress live on the server, so you can stop and pick up later, run several courses at once, and watch a day-by-day trail. Works for languages, exam cram, certs, coding, chess — anything.
